features.name: Create initial agent harness
features.description: Add project instructions, persistent task state, verification commands, scope controls, and session handoff procedures.
acceptance_criteria: All five harness subsystems are represented by repository artifacts.
The standard initialization command runs the full XCTest suite.
A new agent session has an explicit startup and handoff workflow.
evidence: AGENTS.md routes agents through startup, scope, safety, verification, and shutdown rules.
init.sh supports quick, standard test, and signed Release verification modes.
progress.md and session-handoff.md provide cross-session continuity.

features.name: Preserve transient popups in captures
features.description: Freeze visible screen content before SnapSail activation so WPS filter menus and other focus-sensitive popups remain in area screenshots.
acceptance_criteria: Area capture uses pixels captured before the selection overlay activates SnapSail.
Frozen capture supports selections on every connected display at Retina resolution.
Existing first-drag, keyboard, annotation, and overlay teardown behavior remains covered.
Scrolling capture continues to use live screen frames.
evidence: TDD RED: FrozenCaptureGeometryTests initially failed because FrozenCaptureGeometry did not exist.
TDD RED: FrozenBackgroundPainterTests initially failed because FrozenBackgroundPainter did not exist.
Focused geometry, compositing, and SelectionOverlaySafetyTests pass.
./init.sh --release passed 62 tests with 0 failures and verified the signed app bundle on 2026-07-17.
Code review found no remaining Critical or Important issues after the clipped frozen-background redraw fix.
New build launched as build/SnapSail.app with zero overlay windows at idle.
Manual WPS verification confirmed both the area-selection preview and final image retain the open filter dropdown.
